##Figure Descriptions##

## Figure 2
This figure presents Kaplan-Meier survival curves for overall survival (OS) in subgroups of patients with metastatic hormone-sensitive prostate cancer treated with darolutamide + ADT + docetaxel versus placebo + ADT + docetaxel. The subgroups analyzed are: (A) high-volume disease, (B) low-volume disease, (C) high-risk disease, and (D) low-risk disease. Each panel shows improved survival for the darolutamide group, with hazard ratios (HRs) and median survival times indicated for each subgroup.
